title: site/auth GitHub OAuth hub scaffold (Docker, env, UI)

source.subject: fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none

body:
site/auth GitHub OAuth hub scaffold (Docker, env, UI)

## Scope

Complete shared GitHub OAuth hub for tracker, nexus, and pckg: production `AUTH_HUB_*` secrets, session cookies on production domains, and `beskid-auth-hub` issuer documentation in platform-spec/tooling.

## Provenance
- **Repository:** `beskid`
- **Commit:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4)
- **Subject:** fix: add references/bsharp to .gitmodules with update=none
- **Catalog tip:** [`c8e5fc4`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/c8e5fc4) (v0.4 cutoff 2026-05-27)
- **Status:** In Progress

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.4 (Platform services, auth, and delivery tooling)
- **Workstream:** `web-auth-web-common`
- **Deliverable:** `v04-platform-dx`

## Landed

Adds `site/auth/` TanStack app with Dockerfile, docker-compose, `.env.example`, theme provider, and COOLIFY/README docs. Removes obsolete root `examples/` and legacy `manifests/*.xml` in favor of simplified superrepo layout.

## Remaining

- Wire `AUTH_HUB_PUBLIC_URL` + `AUTH_HUB_SECRET` across tracker, nexus, pckg
- End-to-end OAuth handoff and session cookies on production domains
- Document issuer `beskid-auth-hub` in platform-spec/tooling
